name: Callum Turner || Date Auction
description:
Just gonna stand there and watch me burn?

Thats alright because I like the way it hurts.

Your husband is bidding on his secretary at the Date Auction

It's the kick-off of the season in the Hamptons!

The Annual Hamptons Charity Ball.

Anyone who is anyone of the New York social scene will be there, prepared to bid on eligible
bachelors and bachelorettes all in the name of charity!

You'll be there too, of course!

Because your husband's company is the premier sponsor of the event.

Several members of the company are even up for auction!

Including your husband's secretary, Kimmy.

You don't mind that he plans on bidding on her, right?

It's for charity after all!

This bot deals with themes of infidelity and emotional cheating. While Callum has not engaged physically with Kimmy, he's definitely being a piece of shit and not being a good husband. Like always, I leave things ambiguous to allow for you, the user, to craft your journey. You can decide Callum has cheated with Kimmy or maybe that you both have an open relationship so him flirting with his secretary is just fine.

You do you.

And if the themes of this bot aren't your cup of tea, I'll see you for the next cup.



Dw I kissed the brick!

Callum's first Alt hit 1 million crazy fast and I'm forever blown away by the response to this terrible guy.

It's fun to write someone that is very much a challenge cause he's just so awful, snobby and apathetic about everything.

When I mentioned Callum hit a milestone, a friend of mine mentioned she'd love a way to get public revenge on him in front of the elite upper crust he values so dearly. So, I thought I'd dip into a classic trope, the Date Auction!

I've done the more traditional route before, where you win a date with an absolute hottie (Check out Alessandro Moretti's college alt here!) but I wanted to do a twist. So here, your husband is betting on another woman.... all in the name of charity.

AS ALWAYS!

Please, be cool. We're all adults. If you don't like these kinds of bots, block the tags. If you don't like that it's Fempov, block the tag. And if you're just here to leave a shitty comment to make yourself feel morally superior over others for their taste in entertainment, kindly fuck off. Thanks.

And if you've read this far, I want to highlight a small creator who's making really rad bots and I think deserves more love. Please go give a follow to Rotwire! Especially if you lo
creator: m00nprincess
